title: Reinvented Craft
description: Improved all vanilla MINECRAFT aspects for better visual, sound and some gameplay experience.
body:
![Logo image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f6a7eece71d2dbf8a1541e0fb8154e1151d5842_0.webp)

[![CurseForge](https://i.imgur.com/hdG6H6a.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/reinvented-craft)

**_👋Hey everyone, my goal it will to create a perfect vanilla modpack, which make minecraft java look more beautiful, more pleasant, more optimized and more immersive, but at the same time not change the all main gameplay aspects of the game._**

**_The biggest accent i was make in optimization, visual and sound improve of the game.
Modpack contain ≈100 mods, ≈20 resource packs and different shaders._**


# **_✨Some features:_**

- **New 3d items:**

![3d items 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e6a8014fb6ef8eedc32f5bcdf1e929771466083_0.webp)

![3d items 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8504cb4e90fe80fbd1f5ec69cdd72f6e9d0ddd20_0.webp)

![3d items 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1017b7c85e96f43814c6570060520647bf981433_0.webp)

_RP: [3D Tools and Utils](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tools-and-utils)._

- **New 3st person camera and new immersive HUD:**

![New 3d person camera](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c48061b765d090b0b741bc354d09c5e0afd9857c_0.webp)

![New HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eac2fc75c72930e520d5c8a2d2dbb1eb2aebd90_0.webp)

_Mods: [Shoulder Surfing Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/shoulder-surfing-reloaded) and [StarHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/starhud)._

- **New 1st person hand animations:**

![New 1st person hand animations 1](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExOWVyYnJjZ3NneGt0djhwMDl6cWRsN2NkNXBleXhpN2kwNXhvaHI5dCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/3nTcm26XwD75GUWbb6/giphy.gif)

![New 1st person hand animations 2](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExanhkN2R4azdnODQwMmsxOXBhZ3Q0eXoxYnNtYmNlOWpqMDkxcDN2dSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/j9susZjmXfYi3w1aAx/giphy.gif)

![New 1st person hand animations 3](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZWJlZTgwbWI1YjRqNWtsbmtpcjFyOWJqcTVyN3E0NHdjMm80dzRsbyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/qmaI7jtJ5zO11IlOmv/giphy.gif)

![New 1st person hand animations 4](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExMmU4bmxxcXE4YmZjZW9oNzZrMGRscTh0NHdnOHNiN2xsdjE4aW92ZCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/FuIovgJIbUm8LZ9vgv/giphy.gif)

_Mod: [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)._

- **New particle effects:**

![New particle effects 1](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExOWp5em0wbnZhY2lvdDdiYWl4enE2ZzhvazZ1OTRyeGw5MDJ4bXVnYiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/TH305x3aC4nWZTpTFQ/giphy.gif)

![New particle effects 2](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExeXcwcHd0em5uODhlYWduMmtyZDdkMHI2NzBkZm8wZzF3YWx4dmVwaSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/0tgszGqSfkqVE0Oy1U/giphy.gif)

![New particle effects 3](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExeHQ0eGg1a2xwY3hrempxYnQwMWZzcWsydjN0a3BrOTU0dm52M3ZxNSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/aYbWmpdVYoRzk3G1Nx/giphy.gif)

_Mods: [Fancy Block Particles - Renewed](https://modrinth.com/mod/fbp-renewed) and [Effectual](https://modrinth.com/mod/effectual)._

- **New 1st person camera animatins:**

![New 1st person camera animations 2](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExMmR1M2s1Mm0wZ2MwOTU1ajRzeHB5N2V6MHo3ZjV5bWdqbmowNmxudiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/F9C6RDo3C72DDXeT79/giphy.gif)

![New 1st person camera animations 2](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExOHpqZ3hrdzRqNDk3ZW9qa3Fvbjh6MWVvdnVudzZsODlvNWtjazNlaSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/XcaWZTRAnaaTa1WanS/giphy.gif)

_Mod: [Camera Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/cameraoverhaul)._

### **❗❗❗And many many more😁**
